summary: Completed testing of Admin Dashboard feature and profile search input fix. All features working correctly: Admin Dashboard with Overview/Users/Posts tabs, admin-only nav visibility, confirmation dialogs for destructive actions, and search input padding fix preventing text overlap with magnifying glass icon.
passed_tests: Admin login returns role=admin in auth response

GET /api/admin/stats returns all expected stat fields (total_users, verified_users, total_posts, total_messages, total_connections, pending_requests, total_invites, used_invites, new_users_week, new_posts_week)
GET /api/admin/posts returns posts list with total count
GET /api/admin/users returns users list with total count (password_hash excluded)
POST /api/admin/verify-trader toggles user verification status
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/role rejects invalid roles with 400
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/role returns 404 for non-existent user
DELETE /api/admin/posts/{id} returns 404 for non-existent post
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} prevents admin from deleting self (400)
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} returns 404 for non-existent user
Admin Dashboard nav item visible in sidebar for admin users
Admin Dashboard component loads with Overview/Users/Posts tabs
Overview tab shows 6 stat cards (Total Users, Verified Traders, Total Posts, Messages, Connections, Invites)
Users tab shows user list with search functionality
Users tab action menu shows Verify, Role change, Delete options
Posts tab shows post list with delete buttons
Confirmation dialog appears for destructive actions (delete post)
Non-admin users do NOT see Admin Dashboard nav item in sidebar
Profile page CategorySelector search inputs have paddingLeft=36px (sufficient to prevent text overlap with magnifying glass icon)
All 5 CategorySelector search inputs (skills, goods-offering, goods-wanted, services-offering, services-wanted) have correct padding

success_rate.backend: 100% (10 passed, 4 skipped due to missing regular test user)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All admin dashboard and search input tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard feature fully tested and working. The demo@rebeltrade.net user has admin role. Admin endpoints require role=admin. Profile page search inputs have inline style paddingLeft=2.25rem (36px) to prevent text overlap with magnifying glass icon. Regular users (role=user) correctly do not see Admin Dashboard nav item. The sidebar has two instances (mobile drawer + desktop) so data-testid='nav-admin' may resolve to 2 elements - use the visible one.
